summary: Static-site accessibility, SEO, security, asset-localization and performance audit for Luan Rosa portfolio - V26
security_headers: See _headers, netlify.toml, vercel.json and .htaccess. CSP img-src is restricted to self/data/blob only.
performance_notes: All case/article/logo image references are local to the repository.
Long-cache headers added for assets, CSS and JS.
Local image width/height attributes added where available to reduce layout shift.
Responsive CSS and reduced-motion support retained.
limits: The embedded YouTube iframe remains external by design.
No static site can be guaranteed impossible to DDoS; deploy behind Cloudflare/Netlify/Vercel CDN protections and keep account 2FA enabled.
Three logo wordmarks were recreated as local SVGs because the remote sources did not expose downloadable non-AVIF/non-watermarked image files in this environment.
v27_logo_wall_note: Company logo wall restored to previous brand logo sources by request. Article and case images remain local; external img sources are expected only in the company logo wall.
